projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Good work in motion.
projects.helpWhat: Community service projects — painting, food drives, cleanups.
projects.helpWhy: A calm container for good work, not a project management tool.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Projects are for the good work your community does together — painting a house, running a food drive, or organizing a cleanup day.

helpers.title: Helpers
helpers.helpWhat: Volunteers and staff helping with this project.
helpers.helpWhy: Track who contributed to this good work.

reflections.title: Reflections
reflections.helpWhat: Notes and voice transcripts from this project.
reflections.helpWhy: Builds the narrative story of this good work.
reflections.empty: No reflections yet. Add a note or record a voice note to start the story.

noteDialog.description: What happened? What did you notice?

voiceDialog.description: Record what you noticed, felt, or learned.

onBehalfDialog.title: Record for a Helper
onBehalfDialog.description: Let a volunteer record on your device.
